steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank separates two independent clauses: goats are notoriously indiscriminate and they will devour all kinds of shrubs and weeds, leaving virtually no part of any plant unconsumed.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule for elaboration
steps.content:
A colon introduces elaboration when the material following explains or demonstrates what precedes it. Here, the second clause shows what being notoriously indiscriminate means in practice. The other choices create run-ons (C), comma splices (B), or mishandle coordinating conjunctions (A).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
